response: Shipping times depend on the method selected at checkout. Standard Shipping takes 5–7 business days (free on orders over $50, otherwise $5.99). Express Shipping takes 2–3 business days ($12.99 flat). Overnight Shipping delivers the next business day ($24.99 flat). Orders placed before 2:00 PM ET on a business day ship the same day. To check the delivery estimate for a specific order, please provide your order ID.
